crime.value: Child abduction and extortion. Four-year-old Mikhail is snatched by international criminal Dr. Lind, who demands the Count Orlov diamond from the royal sceptre as ransom. Central question: Can the detective locate and rescue the boy before Lind executes him as he did his previous victim?
crime.quote: A ransom letter arrives from Dr Lind...The letter demands the handover of the Count Orlov, an enormous diamond on the royal sceptre

victim.value: Mikhail, four-year-old son of Grand Duke Georgii Alexandrovich. Killable because he is a high-value royal hostage whose abduction creates maximum leverage for extortion and whose death would devastate the Grand Duke.
victim.quote: four-year old Mikhail has been snatched in the confusion. A ransom letter arrives from Dr Lind, an international criminal

closed_world.value: Moscow during the imperial coronation (20 May), with a one-week deadline imposed by Fandorin's ransom negotiation strategy. The royal court, city, and surrounding regions form a bounded investigative space with temporal pressure.
closed_world.quote: Grand Duke Georgii Alexandrovich arrives in Moscow for the coronation...Fandorin suggests that the value of the stone is paid in 'installments', buying the party a week

culprit_and_motive.value: Dr. Lind, international criminal and Fandorin's nemesis (Moriarty figure). Motive: extortion of the Count Orlov diamond; revenge/rivalry with Fandorin; demonstrated pattern of murdering abductees.
culprit_and_motive.quote: Dr Lind, an international criminal and the Moriarty to Fandorin's Sherlock Holmes...or will the Grand Duke's son meet with the same gruesome fate as Lind's last abductee

investigator.value: Erast Petrovich Fandorin, elegant gentleman detective accompanied by his oriental sidekick Masa. The narrative opens with his apparent death but continues his investigation. Point-of-view narrator is a subordinate observer (butler/attendant) who witnesses events.
investigator.quote: The passing heroes introduce themselves as Fandorin and Masa...Our inimitable hero returns in a tantalisingly closely-matched battle of wills
